issue_summaries.title: Queue handoff audit takes too long
issue_summaries.summary: Operators compile weekly handoff metrics by copying data between two internal views.

issue_summaries.title: Pilot comparison notes are inconsistent
issue_summaries.summary: Regional teams record pilot learnings, but the format varies too much for easy scoring.

issue_summaries.title: Improvement ideas lack rollout sizing guidance
issue_summaries.summary: Proposals often describe value well but do not explain how to stage a minimal pilot.

recurring_request_patterns: Need clearer comparisons between proposed ideas and current manual work.
Need simpler pilot-sizing guidance before requesting broader sponsorship.
Need one place to summarize impact, novelty, and delivery risk.
